summary: Validated the smoke-test selector fix on branch tip 0c3442e. Ran the exact CI command `npx playwright test 00-smoke-ci --reporter=list` from /app/tests with EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:8001 — 7/7 passed in 13.0s. Ran `npx playwright test unit-streak --reporter=list` — 15/15 passed in 0.5s. Confirmed zero occurrences of the stale phrases 'My Reflections' and 'Ask any Bible question|devotional topic' inside /app/tests/tests/00-smoke-ci.spec.ts (grep exit 1). Confirmed `git diff HEAD~1 HEAD --stat` shows only tests/tests/00-smoke-ci.spec.ts changed (+12/-5) — no application source files touched. Backend /api/health returned {ok:true}; Expo web preview reachable on :3000. Playwright chromium browsers were missing from the container and had to be installed (`npx playwright install chromium`) before the runs — CI already handles this via --with-deps, so it's not a regression. No new bugs found. No fixes applied. This branch is safe to merge with respect to the smoke gate.
critical_code_review_comments: Selector fix is minimal and correct: the /My Journal/i regex now matches the renamed hero/header/empty-state (renamed in 8fff1ce + 6118c0e), and the /Enter a topic|Ask any Bible or theology/i alternation correctly tolerates both mode-aware placeholders introduced in ba792c7. Both changes are pure test-only updates — no runtime behavior change.
seed_data_creation: None — smoke suite is self-contained; the empty-DB path was exercised for /reflections-history and passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smoke suite (00-smoke-ci) is the required CI gate on this repo; unit-streak is a companion pure-logic suite. Both are green as of 0c3442e. If a future run fails on `bible assistant tab opens and shows its prompt input`, check whether the placeholder text in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/bible-assistant.tsx still matches /Enter a topic|Ask any Bible or theology/i. If it fails on `read-only My Journal route renders`, check /app/frontend/app/reflections-history.tsx still renders text matching /My Journal/i in its header/hero/empty-state. Chromium browsers are downloaded to /pw-browsers/ in this container; if a fresh container reports missing browsers, run `cd /app/tests && npx playwright install chromium` before the test command. Do not use --with-deps here (no sudo apt needed; deps already met).
rca_of_issue: N/A — this iteration was validation-only. Prior iteration diagnosed and fixed two stale selectors in the smoke spec after the Reflections→Journal rename; this iteration confirms the fix and no regression.
